title: Everything You Need to Know About Crypto Payment Integration for Static Sites — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: Digital creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya face the frustrating reality of being unable to receive PayPal payments for their ebooks, courses, and digital products due to geographic restrictions. Many are also blocked from using platforms like Gumroad and Payhip, making it difficult to get paid for their hard work. This is where Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration tool, comes in – it's a game-changer for creators who've been holding back due to payment processor limitations.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

In the world of digital commerce, payment integrations are the unsung heroes that enable creators to receive payments from their buyers. For static site owners, integrating a payment system can be a daunting task, especially when working with cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and USDT. Web3 Wallet Connect simplifies this process by providing a frontend wallet integration that allows buyers to pay directly using their preferred cryptocurrencies. This not only streamlines the payment process but also opens up new revenue streams for creators who were previously restricted by PayPal and other payment processors.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Under the hood, Web3 Wallet Connect uses a multi-chain QR code generation system, which enables buyers to pay using a variety of cryptocurrencies, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and over 300 more coins. The live price feeds ensure that buyers see the current market price, while the automated payment processing eliminates the need for manual intervention. This seamless payment experience not only delights buyers but also reduces the administrative burden on creators, allowing them to focus on what matters most – creating high-quality digital products and engaging with their audience.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Web3 Wallet Connect is specifically designed for digital creators who want to break free from payment processor limitations. Whether you're an ebook author, course creator, or artist, this tool empowers you to receive payments directly from your buyers without the need for intermediaries. By integrating Web3 Wallet Connect into your static site, you can expand your revenue streams, increase your earning potential, and build a loyal customer base that appreciates the flexibility and convenience of cryptocurrency payments.
Web3 Wallet Connect eliminates the need for PayPal and other payment processors, giving creators full control over their revenue streams.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Web3 Wallet Connect consists of several key components that work together to provide a seamless payment experience. These include the frontend wallet integration, multi-chain QR code generation, live price feeds, and automated payment processing. By combining these features, Web3 Wallet Connect creates a robust payment system that is both secure and user-friendly, making it an essential tool for any digital creator looking to unlock the full potential of their online business.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you've learned about the power of Web3 Wallet Connect, it's time to take action. Start by integrating the tool into your static site using the easy-to-follow guide. Next, configure the payment settings to accept your preferred cryptocurrencies. Finally, promote your new payment options to your audience to start receiving payments directly from your buyers. With Web3 Wallet Connect, the possibilities are endless – get started today and unlock a new world of revenue opportunities!
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

The payment processing time for USDT payments is typically instantaneous, thanks to the automated payment processing system provided by Web3 Wallet Connect. This means that creators can receive their funds in real-time, without any delays or hold-ups. By contrast, PayPal and other payment processors often impose hold periods that can range from several days to several weeks, which can be frustrating for creators who need to access their funds quickly.
By integrating Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can expand their revenue streams and increase their earning potential.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more information on integrating Web3 Wallet Connect with your static site, be sure to check out the documentation on the Unchained Commerce GitHub repository. Additionally, if you're interested in learning more about the benefits of using cryptocurrency payments for your digital products, you can explore the Web3 Wallet Connect documentation, which provides a comprehensive guide on how to set up and use the tool. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can start selling your digital products on your static site and receive payments directly from your buyers – visit the Unchained Commerce Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with Web3 Wallet Connect, follow these steps: Integrate the tool into your static site using the easy-to-follow guide; Configure the payment settings to accept your preferred cryptocurrencies; Promote your new payment options to your audience to start receiving payments directly from your buyers; Monitor your payments and adjust your settings as needed to maximize your revenue streams; Continuously update your payment options to stay competitive and attract new buyers.
Web3 Wallet Connect provides a seamless payment experience for buyers, reducing the administrative burden on creators and increasing customer satisfaction.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
